entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop improved through male sterility and potential apomixis

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop improved through male sterility and potential apomixis

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition used to increase yield and produce hybrids in sorghum and pearl millet

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing and harvesting crops

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing offspring with desired traits

entities.name: STERILITY-INDUCING CYTOPLASMS
entities.description: Cytoplasmic factors that cause male sterility

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Offspring of two different varieties or species

entities.name: APOMIXIS
entities.description: A form of asexual reproduction via seeds

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying the properties of a trait or source

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The movement of a gene from one species into the gene pool of another

entities.name: ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving or increasing the effect of a trait

entities.name: HYBRID VIGOR
entities.description: The improved function of a hybrid offspring

entities.name: SELF-POLLINATION
entities.description: The transfer of pollen from the anther to the stigma of the same flower
